text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: To echo the words of a wise philosopher—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"Shame sweetens the soul, for beyond its grip lies the truest of
emotions—a cathartic joy indescribable." Which means...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Simping for cute girls is a rite by which my filthy heart is purified! To
respect is to know shame, and embracing that truth fills my soul with
heaven's light! A hope so pure it, it—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp. I-it was just a dream...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(My name is Agnes Digital. I'm just your average, ordinary
Umamusume.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I'm currently trying to mentally filter the air I breathe. And why's that,
you ask?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Because I couldn't possibly inhale the same air my oshis just breathed! I can't believe I'm at the Tracen Academy! And you won't believe what I'm seeing right now—)

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Could you stop? Quit following me around already!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Who's following who?! I was just heading to the training course. You're the one always tagging along!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(What?! They act like they hate each other, but they totally just
stopped to talk...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Either one of them could've just run off and ignored the other! But
they didn't! And why do you think that is?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Because those two are definitely more than rivals...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Aaaaahasfdhh... The fanservice is unreal!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (And that is what I enrolled for. To simp for my favs right on the frontlines! To experience all the highlights right here in real time, and mentally cheer for them in person!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I'll follow Tracen Academy forever... FOREVEEEER!!1!!1!)

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer, I believe that's all for today. I hope it gave you a good
sense of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Tracen supports a wide variety of racing styles and students. Have a
look around and try to find someone you want to train. ♪
choice_data_list: Of course! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy... A training facility for Umamusume looking to
compete in the Twinkle Series.

It took a lot of hard work, but I'm finally a fully-fledged trainer. What
I lack in experience, I'm determined to make up in passion!
I might've hyped myself up a little too much, though... As I watch the trainees run, I unconsciously let out a cheer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, I can't believe Vodka! Why is she always trying to steal my
place?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I swear, I'm never losing to that jerk!

Yes... No matter how powerful your rival may seem, you're a goddess
on the track and no one can say otherwise!
I'm so honored that I get to worship the ground at your feet!
Radiant! Dazzling! Absolutely divineee!

Bathed in cheers, Daiwa Scarlet surges down the homestretch with
blinding speed!

My fists are pumping, my heart is racing! ...And then I remember
where I am and sneak a glance to the side.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hehhh, hweeegh, haha... hah...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You could practically sense the imaginary Vodka she was fighting.
The mere thought of her rival catching up gave her the strength to
power down the last three furlongs...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that tiny satisfied smirk on her face when she crossed the goal
was just—haaahjkasdk! Heaven is feeding us so good today... Am I
right or am I right?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, s-sorry. Got a little carried away there... That Umamusume
sure was something, huh? Heheh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But you were really making sure the goddess of victory heard your prayers, shouting like that. I'm gonna have to up my simp game.

The sudden otaku monologue stunlocks my brain for a solid couple of
seconds, and then it hits me: why is this student here instead of down
on the track?
choice_data_list: Hey, can I ask you somethi—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! Oh my gosh, wait, they're gonna run together?! After all
that complaining?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Was all that tsundere stuff just a struggle to show her true feelings?!
Eeeep, are we even allowed to be watching this?! The sinfully
bittersweet taste of rivals to—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, r-right. G-go on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I bet this is about me being too loud, huh? To make it up to
you, just pick a racer and I'll tell you all the lore I know.
choice_data_list:
No, I was wondering why you aren't running with
them.

No, I was wondering why you aren't running with
them.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Run with them? Me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? Are you out of your mind? You just saw how beautiful that
technique was! I would just ruin the view!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't run like that even in my dreams! Not to mention it'd
definitely cross the line. Got it? Not happening!
choice_data_list: But you are a student here, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That doesn't mean I belong on the same track as them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It'd be an affront against art—and I'm talking like "burning of
Alexandria" bad! That kinda hubris is what brought down the Tower
of Babel! Anyhow...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Look, it'd be like enjoying a luxurious five-star dessert and then
eating a nasty old half-boiled lukewarm brussels sprout!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A simp like you should understand how wrong it'd be! Okay? I'll just
see myself out, so see ya 'round, Trainer!
Aaaand she's gone.

She was certainly... unique. That speech of hers just made me a little
more curious about her own abilities, if anything.
